proof: function(x1: Pair[Real -> Real, Real], x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1.first, x2, x1.second) = derivative_term_valid_at(x2, x1) }(term, x0)

goal: derivative_list_all[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]](List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], derivative_term_valid_at(x0))

proof: function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x2: Real) { derivative_list_all[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]](x1, derivative_term_valid_at(x2)) = derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x2) }(List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x0)

function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x2: Real) { derivative_list_all[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]](x1, derivative_term_valid_at(x2)) = derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x2) }(List.cons(head, tail), x0)

function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x2: Real) { derivative_list_all[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]](x1, derivative_term_valid_at(x2)) = derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x2) }(List.cons(head, tail), x0)
function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x2: Real) { derivative_list_all[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]](x1, derivative_term_valid_at(x2)) = derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x2) }(tail, x0)
function(x0: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x1: Real) { List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]] != x0 or Real.0 = derivative_terms_sum_fn(x0, x1) }(List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1, x1: T0) { constant[T0, T1](x0, x1) = x0 }[Real, Real](Real.0, x)

goal: derivative_terms_sum_fn(List.cons(head, tail), x) = head.first(x) + derivative_terms_sum_fn(tail, x)
proof: function(x0: Pair[Real -> Real, Real], x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x2: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x3: Real) { List.cons(x0, x1) != x2 or x0.first(x3) + derivative_terms_sum_fn(x1, x3) = derivative_terms_sum_fn(x2, x3) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail), x)

goal: pointwise_add(head.first, derivative_terms_sum_fn(tail), x) = head.first(x) + derivative_terms_sum_fn(tail, x)
proof: function[T0, T1: lib(add).Add](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { pointwise_add[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x2) + x1(x2) }[Real, Real](head.first, derivative_terms_sum_fn(tail), x)

goal: derivative_terms_sum_fn(List.cons(head, tail), x) = pointwise_add(head.first, derivative_terms_sum_fn(tail), x)

proof: function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, x2) = derivative_pred(x2, x1) }(constant[Real, Real](Real.0), Real.0)

goal: p(List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) = (derivative_terms_valid_at(List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x0) implies has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]), x0, derivative_terms_sum_deriv(List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]])))
proof: function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { (not derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x0) or has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(x1), x0, derivative_terms_sum_deriv(x1))) = p(x1) }(List.nil[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]])
function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { (not derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x0) or has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(x1), x0, derivative_terms_sum_deriv(x1))) = p(x1) }(tail)

goal: has_derivative_at(pointwise_add[Real, Real](head.first, derivative_terms_sum_fn(tail)), x0, head.second + derivative_terms_sum_deriv(tail))

proof: function(x1: Pair[Real -> Real, Real], x2: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x3: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { List.cons(x1, x2) != x3 or x1.second + derivative_terms_sum_deriv(x2) = derivative_terms_sum_deriv(x3) }(head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))

function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x0, x2) = derivative_pred(x2, x1) }(pointwise_add[Real, Real](head.first, derivative_terms_sum_fn(tail)), derivative_terms_sum_deriv(List.cons(head, tail)))

goal: p(List.cons(head, tail)) = (derivative_terms_valid_at(List.cons(head, tail), x0) implies has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(List.cons(head, tail)), x0, derivative_terms_sum_deriv(List.cons(head, tail))))
proof: function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { (not derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x0) or has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(x1), x0, derivative_terms_sum_deriv(x1))) = p(x1) }(List.cons(head, tail))

goal: exists(k0: Pair[Real -> Real, Real], k1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) }
proof: not forall(x1: Pair[Real -> Real, Real], x2: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { not p(x2) or p(List.cons(x1, x2)) } or forall(x3: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { p(x3) } = true
(forall(x4: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { p(x4) } = true)
function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { p(x1) }(terms)

goal: exists(k0: Pair[Real -> Real, Real]) { exists(k1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { p(k1) and not p(List.cons(k0, k1)) } }
exists(k0: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { p(k0) and not p(List.cons(bad_head, k0)) }

proof: function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x2: Pair[Real -> Real, Real]) { not p(x1) or p(List.cons(x2, x1)) }(bad_tail, bad_head)
function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]]) { (not derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x0) or has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(x1), x0, derivative_terms_sum_deriv(x1))) = p(x1) }(terms)
has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(terms), x0, derivative_terms_sum_deriv(terms))
function(x1: Real) { not has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(terms), x0, x1) }(derivative_terms_sum_deriv(terms))
let w0: Real satisfy { has_derivative_at(derivative_terms_sum_fn(terms), x0, w0) }
function(x1: Real -> Real, x2: Real) { exists(k0: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1, x2, k0) } = differentiable_at(x1, x2) }(derivative_terms_sum_fn(terms), x0)

goal: monomial_derivative_term_suc(c, n, x0) = Pair.new(monomial_real_fn(c, n.suc), c * (from_nat[Real](n.suc) * x0.pow(n)))
proof: function(x1: Real, x2: Nat, x3: Real) { Pair.new(monomial_real_fn(x1, x2.suc), x1 * (from_nat[Real](x2.suc) * x3.pow(x2))) = monomial_derivative_term_suc(x1, x2, x3) }(c, n, x0)
function(x1: Pair[Real -> Real, Real], x2: Real) { has_derivative_at(x1.first, x2, x1.second) = derivative_term_valid_at(x2, x1) }(monomial_derivative_term_suc(c, n, x0), x0)

function(x1: List[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]], x2: Real) { derivative_list_all[Pair[Real -> Real, Real]](x1, derivative_term_valid_at(x2)) = derivative_terms_valid_at(x1, x2) }(List.singleton(monomial_derivative_term_suc(c, n, x0)), x0)
